name: Arachnogenesis
text: Once per combat, after 1 of your opponent’s non-fighter, non-structure units is destroyed, you may capture that unit. When 1 or more of your units use PRODUCTION, you may return any number of non-infantry units from your faction sheet to reduce the combined cost of the produced units by an amount equal to the returned units’ combined cost.

name: Lair II
text: This system is a Nebula, Nebulae in or adjacent to this unit's system do not affect your ships' movement. Place a Nebula token beneath this unit as a reminder.

name: Wave Transference
text: Whenever you would choose a player or planet with a non-Strategy Card effect, you may choose 1 additional target with that effect. You can choose a player or planet more than once with the same action.

name: Orbital Defense Platform II
text: This unit is placed in the space area of a system. No more than 2 Orbital Defense Platform II may be placed in space per system. You may use this unit’s SPACE CANNON against ships that are adjacent to this unit’s system.

name: Carbon Silicate Laced Plating
text: Once per space combat you may either have one of your units gain the SUSTAIN DAMAGE ability or when one of your units uses SUSTAIN DAMAGE, cancel 2 hits instead of 1.

name: Mine Runner II
text: When a player would explore a planet in a system that contains this unit, explore that planet an additional time.
